cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1929 · 光州 抗日
cover.subtitle:
통학 열차의 한 사건,
5만 학생을 흔들었다.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, November 1929. TWO Korean high-school students in dark navy school uniforms with high collars and round caps, walking briskly side by side down a tree-lined Gwangju street, fists tightened, alert determined three-quarter view. In the misty distance behind them: a small steam train pausing at a tiny rural station platform with a single bare lamp (Naju station reference). On the ground around their feet: scattered fallen autumn leaves. Color: dark blue-gray + crimson autumn-leaf accent + sepia background + warm amber lamp. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 나주역 충돌. 한일 학생 간 통학열차 마찰.
광주 시내 시위. 학생의 날에 만세 시위 시작.

items.title: 신간회 해소 영향
items.desc: 민중대회 좌절 후 노선 갈등 심화.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 발단 장소(나주역) 구분, 학생의 날(11월 3일) 의미, 신간회 진상조사단·민중대회 계획의 좌절과 신간회 해소(1931)와의 인과, 3·1·6·10과의 규모 비교가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small school cap silhouette overlapping a single train track line. RIGHT: a tiny clenched fist silhouette raised. Cream #F2EDE3 base + dark navy #2E3A4A accent + crimson #B23A3A line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
